name: Gunsaw
description:
Gunsaw rpg!

Hard to do the setting in a game like yhis, tried my best. IF YOU HAVE ANYTHING BETTER... DM ME OR IF IM MISSING A SPECIES!!!!

VERY HONORABLE MENTION!:

@Apionne helped me with a LOT of the work on this bot!!!!!! I really couldnt have done this without him, so please go follow him!

As the game updates I'll add more species, I'll also try to see if I can get anything else out of videos and all to improve the bot. Have fun!

The bot probably wont be as good as others since I dont play gunsaw nor is it far into development. I will try to keep track of its updates and all and fix this bot accordingly

Current Experiments(are they called experiments???): Experiment, Orange, Milky, Leapy, Chompy, Voyager, Roza, Baron, Chik, Icke, Velvet, Dune,

THERE WILL BE MORE IN THE FUTURE I JUST CANT FIND DESCRIPTIONS!

PLEASE READ THIS!

Enjoy the bot, make your own scenario, point out the setting and describe it to the bot so it understands. This is still WIP but i want to post it now. The settings are NOT done yet.
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
